meaning: n.pl.妨碍行进或运动的东西
examples: "Petrificus Totalus! " Harry bellowed again, backing away as he swiped his wand through the air; six or seven of them crumpled, but more were coming toward him. "Impedimenta! Incarcerous! "
Each year, donations are raised, and the more donations the longer the game has to be played, interrupted by guest calls, pledge drives, auctions and the usual impedimenta of charity.
